name: Filing Deadline Approaching
subject: 🔴 GST Filing Due {{ doc.due_date }}
message:
⚠️ GST Filing Deadline Approaching

Dear Shop Owner,

Your GST filing for {{ doc.filing_period }} is due on {{ doc.due_date }}.

Your Status:

  • Completed: {{ doc.completed_items or 0 }} / {{ doc.total_items or 0 }} tasks
  • Pending tasks: {{ (doc.total_items or 0) - (doc.completed_items or 0) }}
  • Readiness Score: {{ doc.custom_readiness_score or 0 }}%

Please log in to complete your pending checklist items and ensure all invoices are reconciled before the due date to avoid late filing penalties (₹50/day — ₹200 max per return).

Click here to view your checklist →

Note to Shop Owner: You will also receive this alert via SMS/WhatsApp on your registered mobile number.
